title: Signed and Witnessed
description: Mixing, selling, and debunking records all point toward a single pair. Deduce what potion they produce.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing1 and ing3, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing1=R- (ing1 has R-), ing3=R+ (ing3 has R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing1=G+ (ing1 has G+), ing3=G- (ing3 has G-)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing1=B- (ing1 has B-), ing3=B- (ing3 has B-)
      → SAME sign - → B- resolves.
